mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM reagent WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, cas_number, specification, purity, category_id, unit, storage_condition, safety_stock_threshold, warning_advance_days, status, create_time, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(current_quantity), 0) FROM reagent_batch WHERE reagent_id = reagent.id AND status IN (0, 1)) AS total_stock FROM reagent WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE reagent
name = #{name},
cas_number = #{casNumber},
specification = #{specification},
purity = #{purity},
category_id = #{categoryId},
unit = #{unit},
storage_condition = #{storageCondition},
safety_stock_threshold = #{safetyStockThreshold},
warning_advance_days = #{warningAdvanceDays},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reagent ( name, cas_number, specification, purity, category_id, unit, storage_condition, safety_stock_threshold, warning_advance_days, status, create_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{casNumber}, #{specification}, #{purity}, #{categoryId}, #{unit}, #{storageCondition}, #{safetyStockThreshold}, #{warningAdvanceDays}, #{status}, #{createTime} )
